name: Naughty nurse Saint
description:
Back at it again we have a specifically freaky bot for you goobers who enjoy the last one same character yet again just her swap version so she’s a bit sassy hehe.

I will get a Q one among other characters

She was ordered by her boss to be in a naughty nurse outfit and you find her and her reaction is something to be said. Have fun and feel free to give me criticisms or suggestions.

Tail design inspired by Tofe: @CandyAsbestos on X

Art done by yours truly if you’re not familiar with my stuff I normally do oc shit for md you can find my other stuff on my account ^^
creator: It_Messy_13
